Patch Set 1:

AFAIU, the logic stays the same as we can't predict how many slots will be used, so the complexity won't change?
also, it's not clear how to find number of OSTs in this context.
we could maintain max number of slots used in qmt_device so subsequent calls to 
qmt_alloc_lock_array() wouldn't need to reallocate and rescan.
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as df9adfd1ae2933c98d20e278c4c229eb38c16a3f by Oleg Drokin

parents.subject: LU-18415 pcc: fix panic when add/remove PCC backends

commit.subject: LU-18481 quota: free array in qmt_alloc_lock_array
commit.message:
LU-18481 quota: free array in qmt_alloc_lock_array

qmt_alloc_lock_array() may leak memory if no locks have been found.

Test-Parameter: testlist=sanity-quota
Test-Parameter: testlist=sanity-quota
Test-Parameter: testlist=sanity-quota
